page_metadata.biotools__summary: EZcalcium is a flexible, user-friendly toolbox for analysis of calcium imaging data, controlled by a set of intuitive graphical user interfaces (GUI) based on MATLAB.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: EZcalcium is a flexible, user-friendly toolbox for analysis of calcium imaging data, controlled by a set of intuitive graphical user interfaces (GUI) based on MATLAB.
